native_boundaries.reason: sanitize_key exposes apply_filters('sanitize_key', ...); the candidate shell keeps this native PHP callback boundary around the typed Haxe whitelist core.
The candidate build root installs the Haxe PHP autoloader before formatting.php public functions delegate to generated classes.

remaining_gaps.detail: wp_basename needs path/suffix/multibyte fixture coverage before moving from the oracle mirror into Haxe.
This candidate proves behavior through the differential harness; full distribution ownership still needs linker/include/reflection compatibility receipts.
This fixture covers seed cases. Full formatting PHPUnit parity remains a domain-level closure requirement.
